takeProfit.reason: Bank gains near $207.52 (+36.1%) — the 52-week high where prior advances have stalled. The chain prices a ±25.1% move by expiry, so take profit into strength rather than chasing an extension.

cut.reason: Reduce/exit on a close below $140.27 — losing an ~8% stop (nearest support sits too far below to be a useful exit) breaks the bullish setup that drove the call (thesis invalidated). Cut before theta compounds the loss.

reasons.technical: 52-week high at $207.52 (+36.1%) — where prior advances have stalled and supply sits. RSI would likely be stretched (70+) into this level, so sell into strength rather than chase an extension.
reasons.fundamental: Roughly prices in the next 2-3 quarters of the growth the trade is paying for — beyond it you're betting on an outlier, not the thesis.
reasons.mechanical: Into a run like this, put/call usually compresses toward ~0.5 (peak greed) — it's 0.96 now: a contrarian cue to bank the move.
reasons.narrative: Peak "AI Software & Cloud Adoption" enthusiasm — sell into the strength of the story rather than wait for it to cool.

reasons.narrative: The "AI Software & Cloud Adoption" tailwind is intact — buying the dip here is a discount on the same story, not a fade of it.

picks.analysis: PLTR scores +22 — a Strong Call recommendation. The bullish read is led by Fundamentals (+11), reinforced by Narrative (+6). The biggest contributors are Guidance (+3, raised (AI)), Positive Catalyst (+3, bullish), Major Contract (+2, won). Cutting the other way: Volume Confirmation (-1, 0.24x). Within Technology we gave PLTR a +22 and NVDA a +20 — same direction, lower conviction — which is why we'd take PLTR calls over NVDA calls, mainly on Fundamentals (+11 vs +9) and Technicals (+4 vs +2). The suggested calls sit ~21.3% OTM with 44d to expiry, delta 0.27, mid $5.53 — well inside the 5-30% OTM / Δ 0.20-0.40 / ≤$35 premium / standard-monthly criteria.

picks.thesis: Bullish setup on ADBE: Positive Catalyst (bullish) — news sentiment bullish; Guidance (+12.5%) — +12.5% FY EPS growth est — raised/in-line proxy; Put/Call Ratio Extreme (0.61 P/C) — P/C 0.61 — extreme greed, contrarian bearish; Sector Narrative (tailwind) — rides "AI Software & Cloud Adoption" (str 85, validation); Earnings Surprise (+3.2%) — 2026-02-28 — actual 6.06 vs est 5.87314; EPS Growth YoY (+11.1%); Revenue Growth YoY (+12.0%); Analyst Price Target (+25% to $327.28) — 34 analysts.

drivers.text: Guidance (+12.5%) — +12.5% FY EPS growth est — raised/in-line proxy
Put/Call Ratio Extreme (0.61 P/C) — P/C 0.61 — extreme greed, contrarian bearish
Sector Narrative (tailwind) — rides "AI Software & Cloud Adoption" (str 85, validation)

takeProfit.reason: Bank gains near $421.48 (+60.6%) — the 52-week high where prior advances have stalled. The chain prices a ±21.9% move by expiry, so take profit into strength rather than chasing an extension.

cut.reason: Reduce/exit on a close below $231.74 — losing 20-day support breaks the bullish setup that drove the call (thesis invalidated). Cut before theta compounds the loss.

reasons.technical: 52-week high at $421.48 (+60.6%) — where prior advances have stalled and supply sits. RSI would likely be stretched (70+) into this level, so sell into strength rather than chase an extension.
reasons.fundamental: Roughly prices in the next 2-3 quarters of the growth the trade is paying for — beyond it you're betting on an outlier, not the thesis.
reasons.mechanical: Into a run like this, put/call usually compresses toward ~0.5 (peak greed) — it's 0.61 now: a contrarian cue to bank the move.
reasons.narrative: Peak "AI Software & Cloud Adoption" enthusiasm — sell into the strength of the story rather than wait for it to cool.

triggers: Exit before earnings (2026-06-11): the post-report IV crush can erase a long premium even when the direction is right.
Time stop: don't carry into the final week before Jul 17 '26 — theta accelerates and the breakeven move gets harder each day.
Thesis check: if a higher-scoring setup appears or the original reason for the trade stops being true, rotate out regardless of price.
exitPlan.overviewAi: Scale out of this long call as ADBE approaches its 52-week high, trimming at key resistance levels and cutting losses if support breaks.
